mapper.sql: c.id AS course_id, c.title AS title, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'COMPLETED') THEN 1 END) AS student_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN e.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'COMPLETED') THEN e.price END), 0) AS revenue, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 END) AS completed_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN e.status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 END) AS cancelled_count, COUNT(e.id) AS total_count
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM course c LEFT JOIN enrollment e ON e.course_id = c.id WHERE c.instructor_id = #{instructorId} GROUP BY c.id, c.title

SELECT
FROM course c LEFT JOIN enrollment e ON e.course_id = c.id WHERE c.id = #{courseId} GROUP BY c.id, c.title
